title: adinandra calciphila
intro: Adinandra calciphila, also known as the calciphilous adinandra, is a plant species in the family Actinidiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adinandra calciphila are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs, to create teas, tonics, or poultices for various health concerns.
